title: Smoked Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from Morocco, made with smoked lamb, aromatic spices, and dried fruits.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the dried prunes, cumin, cinnamon, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine, then add 1 cup of water.
Bring to a simmer, cover, and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve with couscous or bread, if desired.
